70.reason: Runtime Error: When the tree is empty (n=0), gen is NULL, and print_leaf dereferences a NULL pointer, causing a crash. Also, if the tree has only one node, print_leaf works, but the recursion assumes both children exist when c is not a leaf, which can cause issues if one child is NULL.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Runtime Error: When the tree is empty (n=0), gen is NULL, and print_leaf dereferences a NULL pointer, causing a crash. Also, if the tree has only one node, print_leaf works, but the recursion assumes both children exist when c is not a leaf, which can cause issues if one child is NULL.

46.reason: [No NULL check for c->left; if node has only a right child, this call leads to segmentation fault.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [No NULL check for c->left; if node has only a right child, this call leads to segmentation fault.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [crashes when c->left is NULL because no NULL check at start of print_leaf]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If c->left is NULL, calling print_leaf(c->left) leads to dereferencing NULL pointer, causing runtime error]

47.reason: [No NULL check for c->right; similarly causes crash if only left child exists.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [No NULL check for c->right; similarly causes crash if only left child exists.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [crashes when c->right is NULL because no NULL check]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If c->right is NULL, calling print_leaf(c->right) leads to dereferencing NULL pointer, causing runtime error]
